# KIP Configuration Schema (v12)

## localStorage Keys

### connectionConfig

```json
{
  "configVersion": 12,
  "kipUUID": "<auto-generated-uuid>",
  "signalKUrl": "http://localhost:3000",
  "proxyEnabled": false,
  "signalKSubscribeAll": true,
  "useDeviceToken": false,
  "loginName": null,
  "loginPassword": null,
  "useSharedConfig": false,
  "sharedConfigName": "default"
}
```

**Critical**: `signalKSubscribeAll` must be `true` for widgets to receive data.

### appConfig

```json
{
  "configVersion": 12,
  "autoNightMode": true,
  "redNightMode": false,
  "nightModeBrightness": 0.27,
  "isRemoteControl": false,
  "instanceName": "",
  "dataSets": [],
  "unitDefaults": {
    "Unitless": "unitless",
    "Speed": "knots",
    "Flow": "l/h",
    "Temperature": "celsius",
    "Length": "m",
    "Volume": "liter",
    "Current": "A",
    "Potential": "V",
    "Charge": "C",
    "Power": "W",
    "Energy": "J",
    "Pressure": "mmHg",
    "Fuel Distance": "nm/l",
    "Energy Distance": "nm/kWh",
    "Density": "kg/m3",
    "Time": "Hours",
    "Angular Velocity": "deg/min",
    "Angle": "deg",
    "Frequency": "Hz",
    "Ratio": "ratio",
    "Resistance": "ohm"
  },
  "notificationConfig": {
    "disableNotifications": false,
    "menuGrouping": true,
    "security": { "disableSecurity": true },
    "devices": { "disableDevices": false, "showNormalState": false, "showNominalState": false },
    "sound": {
      "disableSound": false,
      "muteNormal": true, "muteNominal": true, "muteWarn": true,
      "muteAlert": false, "muteAlarm": false, "muteEmergency": false
    }
  },
  "splitShellEnabled": false,
  "splitShellSide": "left",
  "splitShellWidth": 0.5,
  "splitShellSwipeDisabled": false,
  "widgetHistoryDisabled": false
}
```

### themeConfig

```json
{
  "themeName": ""
}
```

Valid theme names: `""` (default dark), `"deep-black"`, `"true-white"`, `"night-red"`.

### dashboardsConfig

Array of Dashboard objects:

```json
[
  {
    "id": "<uuid>",
    "name": "Dashboard Name",
    "icon": "dashboard-compass",
    "collapseSplitShell": false,
    "configuration": [
      { /* NgGridStackWidget - see below */ }
    ]
  }
]
```

## Dashboard Object

```typescript
{
  id: string;                    // UUID v4
  name: string;                  // Display name
  icon: string;                  // Icon key (see Icon Reference)
  collapseSplitShell: boolean;   // Per-dashboard Freeboard Shell control
  configuration: NgGridStackWidget[];
}
```

## NgGridStackWidget (Widget Placement)

```typescript
{
  id: string;           // UUID v4 (must match widgetProperties.uuid)
  w: number;            // Grid width (columns, max 24)
  h: number;            // Grid height (rows)
  x: number;            // Grid column position (0-23)
  y: number;            // Grid row position (0+)
  selector: "widget-host2";  // Always this value
  input: {
    widgetProperties: {
      type: string;     // Widget type identifier
      uuid: string;     // Same UUID as id
      config: IWidgetSvcConfig;  // Widget-specific config
    }
  }
}
```

## IWidgetPath (Data Binding)

```typescript
{
  description: string;       // Human-readable description
  path: string;              // Signal K path (e.g., "navigation.speedOverGround")
  source: "default";         // Source filter ("default" = all sources)
  pathType: "number" | "string" | "boolean" | "Date";
  isPathConfigurable: true;
  sampleTime: number;        // Sampling interval in ms (500-5000 typical)
  convertUnitTo?: string;    // Target unit for display
}
```

## Dashboard Icon Reference

Common icon keys for dashboard identification:

| Icon Key | Meaning |
|----------|---------|
| `dashboard-dashboard` | Generic dashboard |
| `dashboard-compass` | Navigation |
| `dashboard-wind` | Wind/weather |
| `dashboard-anchor` | Anchor/mooring |
| `dashboard-engine` | Engine/propulsion |
| `dashboard-battery` | Electrical/power |
| `dashboard-thermometer` | Environment/temperature |
| `dashboard-water` | Tanks/water |
| `dashboard-sailboat` | Sailing/performance |
| `dashboard-flag` | Racing |

## KIP Plugin REST API

Base URL: `{SIGNALK_URL}/plugins/kip/`

### Display Management

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/displays` | List KIP instances |
| GET | `/displays/{id}` | Get screens for display |
| PUT | `/displays/{id}` | Set display config |
| GET | `/displays/{id}/screenIndex` | Get active dashboard index |
| PUT | `/displays/{id}/screenIndex` | Set active dashboard `{ screenIdx: N }` |
| PUT | `/displays/{id}/activeScreen` | Request dashboard change |

### History Series

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| GET | `/series` | List history series |
| PUT | `/series/{id}` | Create/update series |
| DELETE | `/series/{id}` | Delete series |
| POST | `/series/reconcile` | Bulk sync series |

### SeriesDefinition

```json
{
  "seriesId": "<uuid>",
  "datasetUuid": "<uuid>",
  "ownerWidgetUuid": "<widget-uuid>",
  "path": "navigation.speedOverGround",
  "context": null,
  "source": null,
  "timeScale": "minute",
  "period": 5,
  "retentionDurationMs": 86400000,
  "sampleTime": 1000,
  "enabled": true
}
```
